title: Fix tls-verify polarity
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Fix the polarity of tls-verify, during the Cobra conversion
it was inadvertently flipped.

At least partially addresses: #1332

Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

comments.body: @EmilienM @mtrmac PTAL.  For this one, I just went for the polarity flip.  I didn't want to mess with changing the commands to emulate how skopeo does it at this time.

@TomSweeneyRedHat 

I just tested it and it works fine now.
The code looks good to me as well. So :+1: on my side.

Thanks a lot!

:pushpin: Commit 9a87a98 has been approved by `rhatdan`
